APIShark

Workspace

Utilities Environments
Utilities Variable helpers

Use {{VAR_NAME}} plus dynamic send-time placeholders like {{$uuid}}, {{$now}}, {{$nowMs}}, {{$isoNow}}, {{$randInt(1,10)}}, {{$randStr(16)}}, {{$base64(text)}}, and {{$urlencode(text)}}.

Matching dynamic tokens reuse one value per send or cURL export action. Invalid {{$...}} syntax shows an error before sending.

Utilities Import with cURL
Utilities Aggregation plugins

Imported plugins are stored in ./.apishark/plugins.json.

HTTP workspace

Headers

Disabled rows stay editable but won’t be sent.

Active Header Value Actions
Body
Plain text

Paste valid JSON to enable folding.

Response

Live response

Status: -

SSE mode: each incoming line is clickable to inspect payload and view JSON.

SSE lines

Click a line to inspect payload. 


                

              


              

                
                  JSON tools appear automatically when the final response body is valid JSON.
                
                

                  
                  
                  
                

              

              

              

            


            

              

                

                  Long aggregated output is capped to keep the page responsive.

            Collections
            
Requests library

          

          

            
          

        


        

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
          

        


        

          Collections are stored in ./collections.json.
        

        

      

    


    

      

        

          

            
cURL export

            
Generated from the current editor state without env interpolation.
